subcodes.first_line: We have verily sent forth the Revealer of the Bayán to herald unto all who dwell in the realm of contingent being this Day wherein the Rock hath cried aloud [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ارسلنا منزل البیان لیبشر من فی الامکان بهذا الیوم الذی فیه صاحت الصخره
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @station of the Manifestation of God
